raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Energy Commission recommended pausing a new oil tax that Governor Newsom had insisted would lower prices.",
    "Governor Newsom stated that high gas prices were the result of price gouging and market manipulation by oil companies.",
    "The California Energy Commission is tasked with implementing the Governor's new tax on oil companies.",
    "Two major refineries announced imminent plans to close, cutting production by up to 20%, leading to estimates that gas prices could reach $8 per gallon.",
    "The California Air Resources Board (CARB) is implementing an update to the Low Carbon Fuel Standard (LCFS), which is expected to increase gas prices by as much as 46 cents per gallon.",
    "Dr. Jasmeet Bains called for the head of CARB to resign due to failure to analyze the impact of new regulations on gas prices before voting to approve them."
  ]
}
```
